hero.name: German Lamela
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I build exceptional digital experiences that are fast, accessible, visually appealing, and responsive.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know the person behind the code
about.philosophyText: I believe in building software that not only works flawlessly but also delivers exceptional user experiences. Clean code, thoughtful design, and continuous learning are at the core of everything I do.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my recent work that I'm particularly proud of
projects.viewMore: Want to see more? Check out my GitHub for additional projects and contributions.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? I'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.success: Message sent successfully! I'll get back to you soon.

contact.workText: I'm currently available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities. Whether you need a complete web application, a redesign, or technical consultation, I'm here to help bring your ideas to life.
contact.availabilityText: I'm currently taking on new clients and opportunities. Let's schedule a call to discuss how I can help with your project.

footer.description: Full stack developer building exceptional digital experiences that are fast, accessible, and visually appealing.
